name.str_pl: copies of The Generic Cookbook

description: Just your standard cookbook filled with recipes that you could almost certainly come up with on your own.

name.str_pl: copies of Main Course Salads

variants.description: A classic cookbook filled with recipes for hearty salads.

name.str_pl: copies of How to Cook Everything

variants.description: An introductory cookbook containing a few simple recipes from every type of cuisine.

name.str_pl: copies of The Art of Simple Food

variants.description: A cookbook with a variety of recipes, mostly focusing on vegetables.

name.str: The Better Homes & Gardens Cook Book
name.str_pl: copies of The Better Homes & Gardens Cook Book

variants.description: Its red and white cover famous across America, this cookbook contains recipes for all sorts of staple foods.

name.str: The Sad Bastard Cookbook: Food You Can Make So You Don't Die
name.str_pl: copies of The Sad Bastard Cookbook: Food You Can Make So You Don't Die

variants.description: When your cooking is limited to 'microwave TV dinners', you need a book like this to elevate you to boiling water without burning it.

name.str_pl: copies of How to Boil Water

variants.description: A cookbook for a complete beginner who's probably never turned a stove on before.

name.str_pl: copies of EveryDayCook: A Cookbook

variants.description: A cookbook with simple recipes, organized by time of day and meal rather than type of food.

name.str: What to Cook When You Don't Feel Like Cooking
name.str_pl: copies of What to Cook When You Don't Feel Like Cooking

variants.description: Based on a popular blog, this book focuses on using minimal ingredients to make simple recipes.

name.str_pl: copies of College Cookbook for Beginners

variants.description: A cookbook for students finally unleashed into their own kitchens.

name.str: Super Easy Cookbook for Beginners: 5-Ingredient Recipes and Essential Techniques to Get You Started in the Kitchen
name.str_pl: copies of Super Easy Cookbook for Beginners: 5-Ingredient Recipes and Essential Techniques to Get You Started in the Kitchen

variants.description: A cookbook for beginners focused on recipes that only require five ingredients.

name.str: 5 Ingredients, Bro! A No-Stress Cookbook for Teens
name.str_pl: copies of 5 Ingredients, Bro! A No-Stress Cookbook for Teens

variants.description: A cookbook for beginners focused on recipes that only require five ingredients, designed for teenagers.

name.str: The Beginner's Cookbook: Simple - Easy - Delicious
name.str_pl: copies of The Beginner's Cookbook: Simple - Easy - Delicious

variants.description: A cookbook with a variety of simple recipes like pizza, roast chicken, and risotto.

name.str: The 5-Ingredient College Cookbook: Recipes to Survive the Next Four Years
name.str_pl: copies of The 5-Ingredient College Cookbook: Recipes to Survive the Next Four Years

variants.description: Another of the 'five-ingredient' genre of cookbooks, this one focused on college students.

name.str: Quick and Delicious: 100 Recipes to Cook in 30 Minutes or Less
name.str_pl: copies of Quick and Delicious: 100 Recipes to Cook in 30 Minutes or Less

variants.description: Gordon Ramsey's cookbook of simple recipes you can make with things you (hopefully) already have in your kitchen.

name.str: The Complete Cookbook for Beginners : Essential Skills and Step-by-Step Techniques
name.str_pl: copies of The Complete Cookbook for Beginners : Essential Skills and Step-by-Step Techniques

variants.description: A cookbook with 101 simple recipes, including tips for setting up a kitchen.

name.str_pl: copies of The Homebrewer's Bible

description: A book full of easy-to-follow recipes and useful advice on homebrewing, malting, and fermenting.  It even smells faintly of booze.

name.str_pl: copies of Cooking on a Budget

description: A nice cookbook that goes beyond recipes and into the chemistry of food.

name.str_pl: copies of To Serve Man

//: Wasn't commercially traded.  ('Parody' only covers so much.)  Should get a serious price modifier for non-Cannibals.
description: It's… it's a cookbook!

name.str_pl: copies of Cucina Italiana

description: This cookbook is written in Italian, but handily illustrated with step-by-step photo instructions.

name.str: La Vida Deliciosa: Definitive Mexican Cuisine
name.str_pl: copies of La Vida Deliciosa: Definitive Mexican Cuisine

description: This cookbook has lots of colorful pictures of finished dishes and features personal tips from the author/chef on nearly every recipe.  On the back cover are two joyful photos of the author in the kitchen with their parents: one as a child and one as an adult.

name.str_pl: copies of Sushi Made Easy

description: A simple text for the aspiring sushi lover, this easy-to-read guide is filled with lots of helpful illustrations for everything from basic rice preparation to setting a proper Japanese table.

A big binder full of somebody's family recipes.  The well-turned pages and creased corners speak volumes of the culinary knowledge contained within.  You could probably learn a lot about cooking from studying this domestic artifact.

name.str_pl: issues of Bon Appetit

description: Exciting recipes and restaurant reviews.  Full of handy tips about cooking.

name.str_pl: issues of Glamopolitan

description: A full-size glossy women's magazine.  There are a few unoriginal recipes and some simple cooking tips somewhere in between the fashion photos and the sex advice columns.

name.//~: That would translate out to The Scottish Book of Cookery, or The Scottish Cookbook.
name.str_pl: copies of Ye Scots Beuk o Cuikery

description: A semi-translated Gaelic cookbook from sixteenth century Scotland.  While a bit difficult to read, as there are a disquieting number of illustrations of people stabbing each other mixed with rants about 'True Scotsmen', it provides insights into medieval Scottish cuisine and culture.

name.str_pl: copies of Vinegar Maker's Handbook

description: This book describes in detail all the ways that one can make vinegar.  You would have thought that there wasn't much to making vinegar, but the girth of this book tells you otherwise.

name.str_pl: copies of Drink the Harvest

description: Canning foods doesn't have to stop with jam and pickles.  This book provides a plethora of juices that can be preserved.
//: Later on add mead transforms that don't require distilling to this book that match the source book. Possibly wait til beekeeping is added.

name.str_pl: copies of Offal Holiday Cooking

description: Offal Holiday Cooking, by Evelyn Turncoat, is a book of holiday recipes that utilize organ meats from various animals.  For the true nose-to-tail cook.

name.str_pl: copies of Things to Do with Milk

description: Whatever you want to do with milk, you will probably find it in this book.

name.str: Liver-Licious Recipes Your Kids Will Love
name.str_pl: copies of Liver-Licious Recipes

description: This cookbook is written by liver enthusiast Tamsyn Beckerleg.  Inside you'll find a great deal of anecdotes about the near-certain ruination of children who refuse to eat their liver.

name.str_pl: copies of Blood for the Greater Good

description: A recipe book compiled by blood-as-food advocate Alžbeta Bátoriová.  The consumption of blood is a taboo among members of many Abrahamic religions, but they aren't going to stop you now.  This book has bonus material for those with particular tastes.

name.str: Dainty Dishes Fit for a King
name.str_pl: copies of Dainty Dishes

description: This cookbook contains many fanciful recipes.  Some of them are even worth the trouble to actually prepare.  Lovely pen and ink illustrations of overweight knights and gluttonous monks line the pages.

name.str: Eat Your Way to a Fit Physique
name.str_pl: copies of Eat Your Way

description: This self-help book, by "acclaimed nutrition and health guru Amar de Freitas," is as dubious as its title.  Worse, it is boring.  It does, however, contain a few basic cooking instructions.

name.str_pl: copies of Food Fashions

description: A cookbook professing itself to be for those seeking "daring and sophisticated flavors."  The book exhorts the reader to defy convention and break the rules, and then presents a number of useful rules and conventions for preparing food.

name.str_pl: copies of Winemaking for Beginners

description: Winemaking is an art form.  This book teaches you how to crayon within the lines.

name.str_pl: copies of You Can Can at Home

description: This entry-level guide to home canning talks about the importance of acidity and food contents in preservation, and how to avoid contaminants in your canning batches.

name.str_pl: copies of Can Sealer Instructions

description: This dry guide to a home-use tin can sealer goes into clear detail on everything you can seal with the device and how to do it safely, and includes some basic recipes.

name.str_pl: copies of Vacuum Sealer Instructions

description: This dry guide to a home-use vacuum sealer goes into clear detail on everything you can seal with the device and how to do it safely, and includes some basic recipes.

name.str_pl: copies of The Baker's Companion

description: This book promises to teach you the ways of baking, from cakes to souffles.

name.str_pl: copies of Fermenting Culture

description: Fermenting as a cooking practice only recently came back into vogue before the Cataclysm.  Here is a book with dozens of recipes, many of which you are unlikely to ever see the ingredients for again.

name.str: Out of the Holler and into the Home: A guide to home distillation
name.str_pl: copies of Out of the Holler

description: A book describing the history of at-home distillation.  Each chapter is named after a different type of liquor, and contains a complete recipe for its namesake.

name.str_pl: copies of Sweets for Sweet

description: Sweets for your Sweet Child is a best-selling cookbook marketed to the parents of young children.  Every recipe uses oversized text, easy words and diagram instructions for children learning to cook with their parents.

name.str_pl: copies of Tasting India

//: Statistics derived from a real book.
description: A thick hardcover book as much about Indian culture as it is a cookbook, clearly written with adoration.

name.str_pl: copies of Curry cookbook

description: A book for making curry, the greatest of all meals.

name.str_pl: copies of 50 Great Curries of India

variants.description: This best-selling cookbook contains 50 curry recipes, ranging from classics like Goa lamb vindaloo or rogan josh to less well-known ones like mango and yogurt curry.

name.str: Easy Indian Curry Recipes for Beginners
name.str_pl: copies of Easy Indian Curry Recipes for Beginners

variants.description: A curry cookbook designed for first-time curry makers, including ingredient substitutions and a guide to commonly-used spices.

name.str: Curry: Recipes From Indian Home Kitchens
name.str_pl: copies of Curry: Recipes From Indian Home Kitchens

variants.description: A curry cookbook with a variety of curries from across India.

name.str: Easy Curry Cookbook: Cook Delicious Curries with this Simple Guide
name.str_pl: copies of Easy Curry Cookbook: Cook Delicious Curries with this Simple Guide

variants.description: A simple cookbook designed for curry beginners.

name.str: The Greatest Indian Curries Ever Created!: A Cookbook of 50 Delicious Curry Recipes Direct from India
name.str_pl: copies of The Greatest Indian Curries Ever Created!: A Cookbook of 50 Delicious Curry Recipes Direct from India

variants.description: This cookbook contains a variety of recipes to suit any taste.

name.str: No Worries, Just Chicken Curries: Over 70 incredible Indian chicken recipes
name.str_pl: copies of No Worries, Just Chicken Curries: Over 70 incredible Indian chicken recipes

variants.description: Not just chicken curry, this contains recipes for sauces and vegetable sides as well.

name.str: Indian Restaurant Curries at Home, Volume 1
name.str_pl: copies of Indian Restaurant Curries at Home, Volume 1

variants.description: A cookbook filled with recipes that replicate curries served in famous British restaurants.

name.str: The Ultimate Curry Cookbook: Mouth-Watering and Soul Satisfying Curries
name.str_pl: copies of The Ultimate Curry Cookbook: Mouth-Watering and Soul Satisfying Curries

variants.description: This cookbook has 50 curry recipes from around the world, created using simple ingredients.

name.str: Thai Curry Cookbook - Exploring Thailand’s Rich and Spicy Curry Traditions
name.str_pl: copies of Thai Curry Cookbook - Exploring Thailand’s Rich and Spicy Curry Traditions

variants.description: A cookbook with a variety of Thai curries, from regional specialties to street food.

name.str: The Good Old Thai Curry Cookbook: Classic Thai Recipes Featuring Red, Green, and Yellow Curries
name.str_pl: copies of The Good Old Thai Curry Cookbook: Classic Thai Recipes Featuring Red, Green, and Yellow Curries

variants.description: A cookbook focused on breaking down red, green, and yellow curries with step-by-step instructions.  You're not sure the cutesy names for all the curries are authentic, though.

name.str_pl: copies of The Sioux Chef

//: Statistics derived from a real book.
description: A thick hardcover book about the history and future of Native American cuisine.  As much recipe collection as manifesto.

name.str_pl: copies of The Turkish Cookbook

description: The definitive cookbook of hearty, healthy Turkish cuisine.
